cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Anthony could have gone to the bookstore. So, the main thing here is to check the times when Anthony was seen doing other activities and see what times are free for him to go to the bookstore. Also, the bookstore is closed after 9 pm, so he has to go before that. First, let's list out all the given information: 1. Anthony woke up at 7 am. 2. David saw Anthony working at the office from 7 am to 8 am. 3. Leslie saw Anthony getting a coffee at the cafe from 8 am to 11 am. 4. Sarah saw Anthony watching a movie at the theater from 1 pm to 9 pm. 5. The bookstore was closed after 9 pm. Now, we need to figure out the times when Anthony wasn't doing any of these activities. Let's break it down step by step. Anthony's schedule: - 7 am: Wakes up. - 7 am to 8 am: At the office (with David). - 8 am to 11 am: At the cafe (with Leslie). - 1 pm to 9 pm: At the theater (with Sarah). - Bookstore is closed after 9 pm. So let's see the gaps between these activities. From 7 am to 8 am: Office. From 8 am to 11 am: Cafe. Then there's a gap between 11 am and 1 pm. After that, from 1 pm to 9 pm: Theater. So the only time Anthony is unaccounted for is between 11 am and 1 pm. Because after that, he's at the theater until 9 pm when the bookstore closes. Before that, he was at the office and then the cafe. Therefore, the only possible time he could have gone to the bookstore is between 11 am and 1 pm. Looking at the options: A) 11 am to 1 pm – This matches the gap we found. B) 8 am to 11 am – He was at the cafe then. C) 7
